outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Negative GEX across all expiries (-13.55B total) creates dealer short gamma positioning. Expect amplified price movements and potential cascading effects if key levels break.
outlook.summary: Spot pinned exactly at gamma flip (671.11) - critical inflection. Heavy put OI at 675 (above spot) creates dealer selling pressure. Support confluence at 665-660. Max pain magnet at 686 (~2.2% above) limits downside. Watch for volatility expansion on any directional break.

levels.motivazione: Exact spot alignment - critical inflection where cumulative GEX changes sign. In negative GEX environment, this is the battle zone for directional control.
RESONANCE across ALL 5 expiries. Major structural resistance with 43K+ OI in WEEKLY_1 and 48K in MONTHLY_1. Dealer hedging creates strong selling pressure.
RESONANCE level. WEEKLY_1 dominant put wall (57,455 OI) plus significant OI in MONTHLY_1 and MONTHLY_2. First major support below spot.
CONFLUENCE level with massive put OI ABOVE spot (49K 0DTE, 66K WEEKLY_2, 75K MONTHLY_1). Dealers short puts must sell to hedge - creates downward pressure.
CONFLUENCE support with 61K OI in WEEKLY_2 and 80K in MONTHLY_1. Secondary structural support if 665 breaks.
Cluster of max pain levels (684-690 across expiries). MM target zone ~2.2% above spot. Acts as upside magnet in negative GEX environment.
MONTHLY_1 dominant level with 115,115 OI - largest single strike. Deep structural support, crash protection zone.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH: Negative GEX (-6.11B total) amplifies movements. Dealers short gamma will accelerate any directional move.
outlook.summary: Spot pinned at Gamma Flip (593.8) across 4 expiries - critical inflection point. Massive CALL WALL at 600.0 (RESONANCE across ALL 5 expiries) caps upside. Negative GEX environment means volatility expansion likely. Break below 590.0 triggers dealer selling cascade; break above 600.0 requires significant volume. Max Pain cluster 605-609 suggests upside magnet if resistance clears.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE across ALL 5 expiries (0DTE+WEEKLY_1+WEEKLY_2+MONTHLY_1+MONTHLY_2). Massive PUT OI: 12,456 + 46,413 + 10,357 + 102,185 + 29,802. Primary resistance capping all upside. Dealers short puts must BUY to hedge approaching this level.

RESONANCE across 4 expiries (0DTE+WEEKLY_2+MONTHLY_1+MONTHLY_2). At current spot - zero gamma equilibrium. Dealers flip from long to short gamma here. High probability of directional breakout. Negative GEX amplifies moves away from this level.

CONFLUENCE (WEEKLY_1+MONTHLY_1). Massive OI: 31,569 + 107,122 (highest in MONTHLY_1). High VOL/OI ratio 5.95 in 0DTE indicates unusual activity. Key structural support - break triggers dealer selling cascade in negative GEX environment.
WEEKLY_2 PUT WALL with 61,126 OI (highest in expiry). Just 1.2 points above spot acts as immediate friction. High VOL 37,720 in 0DTE (VOL/OI 5.08). Dealers short puts create resistance zone.
CONFLUENCE (WEEKLY_1+MONTHLY_1). Dominant PUT OI: 55,566 (highest in WEEKLY_1) + 35,352. Secondary structural support if 590.0 fails. Deep hedging zone.
Near Max Pain cluster (605-609 across expiries). MONTHLY_1 shows 28,132 PUT OI + 15,107 CALL OI. MM target zone if 600.0 resistance clears. Upside magnet in negative GEX squeeze.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Negative total GEX (-0.78B) with spot at gamma flip creates volatile conditions and directional breakout potential
outlook.summary: Spot price exactly at gamma flip (24365.79) with negative total GEX across near-term expiries. This creates a critical decision point - break below targets 24100-24000 support cluster, break above targets 25000-25200 resistance zone near Max Pain. Dealers short gamma amplifies moves.

levels.motivazione: Major support across 4 expirations (0DTE+WEEKLY_1+WEEKLY_2+MONTHLY_2) with 2052 total OI. Primary dealer hedge zone with MONTHLY_2 dominance (1502 OI).
Spot price at gamma flip level across WEEKLY_1, WEEKLY_2, MONTHLY_2. Critical equilibrium where dealer gamma changes sign. High directional breakout probability.
Consistent resistance across 4 expirations with Max Pain confluence (24900-25000). Combined with 25075 (4036 OI) forms major upside barrier.
Strong secondary support across 3 expirations. WEEKLY_2 (294 OI) and MONTHLY_1 (284 OI) dominance. First defense below gamma flip.
Resistance across 4 expirations. 0DTE dominant (335 OI) with MONTHLY_1 (240 OI) confirmation. Secondary upside barrier.
Deep support across 4 expirations. MONTHLY_1 dominant (753 OI). Tail risk protection level for crash scenarios.
MONTHLY_2 dominant call wall (985 OI). Upper resistance cap with additional support in 0DTE and WEEKLY_1.
Support across 3 expirations. 0DTE active (176 OI) with MONTHLY_1 (177 OI) and MONTHLY_2 (157 OI). Secondary defense level.
